overview.description: AI-native software agency specialising in digital transformation, AI implementation, and on-premise AI infrastructure for Czech and Central European businesses
overview.description_long: no big deals s.r.o. is a Prague-based AI-native agency that helps organisations digitise processes, build custom AI solutions, and deploy on-premise AI infrastructure. Core offerings include a 4-step digital-transformation methodology (AI audit → problem map → development → continuous support), two proprietary products (Forge.AI: on-premise AI infrastructure with 150+ open-source models and enterprise hardware; Auditbot: AI-driven organisational audit chatbot), and bespoke AI integration across sectors including manufacturing, healthcare, education, finance, and customer service.
overview.tagline: Audit, vývoj, implementace AI – méně nákladů, více zisku

history.origin_story: Founded in 2025 by two co-founders with backgrounds in software engineering and strategic consulting, drawing on 15+ years of combined experience in digital transformation. Incorporated as no big deals s.r.o. in June 2025 in Prague.

key_milestones.event: Incorporated (IČ 23362642), launched nobig.deals and products Forge.AI and Auditbot

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Core value is AI consulting and integration, which is commoditisable, but proprietary products (Forge.AI on-premise AI infrastructure and Auditbot) plus local Czech market expertise provide some differentiation. Customer lock-in through end-to-end implementation and support relationships mitigates near-term risk.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Czech SMB digital-transformation consulting market is real and growing, but highly fragmented with many boutique agencies and larger SIs competing for the same customers. Demand for on-premise AI (Forge.AI) may provide a stickier niche.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Incorporated in June 2025 with no known external funding. Very small team of 8 with unclear revenue traction. Bootstrapped micro-startup at highest-risk stage of existence.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Very early-stage startup (incorporated 2025) with no disclosed funding, small team, and a services-heavy model in a competitive market. While proprietary products add potential upside, the company has yet to demonstrate scale or financial resilience.

metadata.notes: Company incorporated 2025-06-05 per ARES Czech business registry (IČ 23362642). Founder first names only published on website (Michal/Jan). Website also accessible at nobigdeals.cz. Previous registered address was Vršovická 817/5; current HQ is Uralská 688/5, Bubeneč, Praha 6.
